metadata.description: Founder-level skills for PLG, paid marketing, SEO, and analytics. Built by founders, for founders.

plugins.name: plg-architect
plugins.description: Product-Led Growth strategy skills: strategy, ICP research, competitive moats, viral loops, content strategy, growth metrics. Strategy-first, sacrifice-focused, evidence-based.

plugins.name: seo
plugins.description: SEO suite (11 skills): technical + AI-crawler audit (with site architecture), AI-search & entity optimization, keyword & competitor research, SEO strategy, on-page, content (strategy + creation), link building, local, programmatic, and revenue analytics. Evidence-based, sacrifice-first.
